<!--
  PR TITLE FORMAT (required):
  type(scope): JIRA-ID description

  Examples:
    feat(patient): PROJ-1234 Add address validation
    fix(auth): PROJ-5678 Fix token refresh on session expiry
    critical(api): PROJ-9999 Patch data exposure in patient endpoint
    chore(ci): PROJ-4321 Update build pipeline dependencies

  Valid types: feat | fix | chore | docs | refactor | perf | test | ci | build | critical
-->

## Work Type

- [ ] Bug
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Change Request
- [ ] Critical Fix

## Acceptance Criteria

## Testing Done

Describe tests run

## Checklist

- [ ] No `Console.WriteLine` or debug artifacts left in code
- [ ] No PII (patient names, DOB, SSN, etc.) in log statements
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated

Write a customer-readable description of this change
